basic_details.job_title: NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Technology Silchar (NIT Silchar) has officially announced the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. Candidates who are up to 28 years of age and hold an M.Tech./ M.E. degree in ECE, CSE, EE, or E&I with a valid GATE score, along with research/ project experience in Wireless Communication Systems and Machine Learning, can submit their applications through Email on or before 15-07-2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application details are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age Relaxation: As per Govt of India Rules for SC/ST/OBC/WOMEN/PWD candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech./M.E. degree with valid GATE in ECE/ CSE/ EE/ E&I. Research/Project Experience in Wireless Communication systems and Machine Learning.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.Tech./ M.E. degree with valid GATE in ECE/ CSE/ EE/ E&I. Research/Project Experience in Wireless Communication systems and Machine Learning.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Silchar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Silchar JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your filled-up application form via email is 15th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Tech./M.E. degree with a valid GATE score in ECE/CSE/EE/E&I, along with research or project experience in Wireless Communication systems and Machine Learning.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post is 28 years, with age relaxation applicable for reserved categories as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selected Junior Research Fellow will receive a monthly stipend of INR 37,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the JRF post at NIT Silchar?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Silchar.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email to the designated email address provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an initial screening of applications followed by an interview, which may be conducted online or offline.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position is a temporary role, as indicated in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIT Silchar located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Silchar is located in Silchar, Assam, with the pincode 788010.
